title: Genome Editor UI (sliders, weight adjustments, JSON import/export)
description: Build the Genome Editor within Options > Genome tab (P2.1). Features: per-dimension labelled sliders with current value display, relative weight adjustment (drag-to-reorder or +/- nudge), reset-to-defaults button, JSON import (paste or file upload) with schema validation, JSON export to clipboard or file. Live preview of how a hypothetical product would score with the current Genome. All edits call saveGenome() and trigger SYNC_STATE. TDD for import validation, export format, and weight normalisation.
